gap_summaries.fix: Set evidence['deterministic'] = False when config.deterministic is False, after run_collector_with_timeout returns

production_readiness.notes: All subprocess calls use list args (no shell=True). Fail-closed design correct: persist/audit failures propagate. Atomic writes via write_atomic. Single-user threat model per project conventions.
